name: First Aid Box — 11 x 3 x 13.5 Inch (Metal, Empty)
shortDescription: Slim metal first aid box, 11 x 3 x 13.5 inch, for tighter wall-mount locations.
longDescription: A slim-profile metal first aid box for locations where depth is limited — corridors, stairwells and narrow break rooms — with a lockable red-framed front and internal shelf. Supplied as an empty enclosure only.

images.alt: First Aid Box — 11 x 3 x 13.5 Inch (Metal, Empty) supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
